title: Category Cannibalisation × Cross-Sell Graph Analysis (Retail)
summary: ONS Family Spending Workbook 1 (Detailed Expenditure and Trends) page reachable; confirms household-spending-by-category data exists at the claimed granularity.

evidence.claim: ONS Family Spending Workbook 1 (Detailed Expenditure and Trends) reachable

Dataset Family spending workbook 1: detailed expenditure and trends

  • Contact:
    Family Spending team
  • Release date:
    10 September 2025
  • Next release:
    To be announced

About this Dataset

Detailed breakdown of average weekly household expenditure on goods and services in the UK. Data are shown by place of purchase, income group (deciles) and age of household reference person.

Edition in this dataset

evidence.reason: all 1 sources reachable; data shape consistent with claim

notes: Public leg = ONS Family Spending Workbook 1 (canonical UK household-spending-by-category dataset).
Co-purchase graph leg = client transactional data; recipe is PLAUSIBLE end-to-end at deploy.
ONS Beta API does NOT index this workbook; we verify the publication route directly.
